findings: ProductGallery thumbnails navigable via arrow keys with visible focus ring
All product images have descriptive alt text (not just filename or 'product image')
Image zoom modal traps focus, closes on Escape and click-outside
Variant selectors use <fieldset>/<legend> for option groups with radio-like semantics
Color swatches include visible text label AND tooltip — never rely on color alone
Selected variant announced via aria-live region for screen readers
Review star ratings include aria-label='4.2 out of 5 stars based on 127 reviews'
Add-to-cart confirmation announced via aria-live='polite' region
Cart count badge has aria-label='3 items in cart'
Sticky mobile bar does not obscure content; has 48px minimum touch target
gaps: Image zoom pan-and-scroll behavior not tested with screen reader virtual cursor
Review photo attachments lack individual alt text descriptions
Breadcrumb markup is present but missing schema.org structured data annotation

domain_boundaries: features/product/ — gallery, variant selection, product info (read-only product data)
features/cart/ — add-to-cart, quantity, cart badge count (mutation-heavy)
features/reviews/ — review list, rating chart, sort/filter (read with pagination)
shared/ui/ — BreadcrumbNav, Button, Badge, RatingStars, Skeleton
shared/api/ — typed fetch layer with product/review/cart contracts
state_management: React Context for cart state (optimistic add-to-cart, cart count)
React Query for product data and reviews (server-state caching)
Local state for gallery image selection and zoom modal open/close

adopted: Semantic color tokens referenced via CSS custom properties in all components
Consistent spacing scale applied across product layout grid
RatingStars component shared between review cards and rating summary
Skeleton component supports card and text variants for loading states
gaps: ProductGallery and RelatedProducts have different carousel implementations — should converge
No centralized motion tokens; animations defined inline per component
VariantSelector component not generalized — color swatches and size chips could share base

observations: Primary CTA (Add to Cart) prominently positioned with high-contrast styling
Free shipping threshold progress bar visible near cart button (engages upsell)
Variant selection provides immediate visual feedback — selected swatch has ring indicator
Unavailable variants shown as disabled with strikethrough label rather than hidden (prevents confusion)
Image gallery supports thumbnail navigation and full zoom for detail inspection
Mobile sticky add-to-cart bar reduces scroll-back friction on long product pages
Add-to-cart provides clear confirmation with animated badge count update
concerns: No size-guide link near size selector — users must scroll to description for fit info
Review sort selection resets page to 1 without warning when currently on page > 1
Related products carousel has no 'View all' link for the category

findings: Add-to-cart endpoint requires CSRF token validation on mutation
Review submission sanitizes user-generated content (XSS prevention on review body and title)
Cart operations use server-authoritative pricing — client-side price is display-only
No PII exposed in product page URLs or analytics events
Image zoom modal loads full-resolution images authenticated via signed URLs (prevents hotlinking)

tests: ProductGallery keyboard navigation: arrow keys move between thumbnails, Enter opens zoom
VariantSelector: selecting a size enables add-to-cart; unavailable options are disabled
AddToCart: click adds item, button shows confirmation state, badge updates
ReviewList: sort changes re-fetch reviews with correct params; empty state shows CTA
axe-core scan passes with zero violations on product page
Visual regression test at 1440px, 1024px, and 375px breakpoints
performance: Product image LCP under 2.0s with responsive srcset and WebP format
Image zoom modal defers full-res image load until modal opens
Reviews lazy-loaded below fold with IntersectionObserver
No Cumulative Layout Shift — all images have explicit width/height and aspect-ratio
Add-to-cart response under 300ms with optimistic UI update
maintainability: Components named by domain role (ProductGallery, VariantSelector) not visual style
Design tokens consumed via CSS custom properties — zero raw hex values in feature styles
Each feature module per products/cart/reviews boundary; max 400 lines per module
Cart state machine documented (idle → adding → confirmed|error) in feature README
